purpose: Pin the default-fingerprint convenience helpers that wrap bd-juvqm.3 / bd-8b70o's run_live_measurement and run_live_measurement_pair so that callers no longer have to invoke environment_fingerprint() (bd-6epxt) themselves before constructing a LiveMeasurementRow / LiveMeasurementPair. The wrappers fail closed by inheriting every existing precondition of the underlying functions; their only added behavior is calling system_fingerprint::environment_fingerprint() at invocation time.

env_override.behavior: When set to a non-empty trimmed string, both convenience helpers return rows whose environment_fingerprint field equals that override value verbatim, because the helpers funnel through system_fingerprint::environment_fingerprint() which honors the override (bd-6epxt).

downstream_consumers.consumes: LiveMeasurementRow construction — convenience helper saves callers the explicit environment_fingerprint() call.
